user.title: Connect to ComfortClick bOS
user.description: Enter your bOS gateway URL and credentials. The next steps discover and select the lights.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate ComfortClick bOS
reauth_confirm.description: The session for {username} was rejected. Enter the current password.

reconfigure_credentials.title: Update credentials
reconfigure_credentials.description: Update the gateway URL, username or password.

floor.title: Choose a floor
floor.description: Pick a floor to select its lights, then repeat for other floors. {total} lights selected so far. Choose Finish when done.

lights.title: Lights on {floor}
lights.description: Select the lights to add on {floor}.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to reach the gateway. Check the base URL and network.
error.no_lights: No lights were discovered under Lights & Shading.

abort.invalid_auth: Stored credentials were rejected. Remove and re-add the integration.
abort.cannot_connect: Failed to reach the gateway during re-scan.
abort.no_lights: No lights were discovered under Lights & Shading.
